memberdef.name: ASSERT_DOUBLE_EQ
memberdef.initializer: if( ! doubleEq((a), (b)) ) { \ assertStream.str(""); \ assertStream.precision( 12 ); \ LOCATION(assertStream) \ assertStream << "Expected " << a << ", received " << b << endl; \ assertStream << token << endl; \ throw std::runtime_error(assertStream.str()); \ }

memberdef.name: ASSERT_DOUBLE_NEQ
memberdef.initializer: if( doubleEq(a, b) ) { \ assertStream.str(""); \ LOCATION(assertStream); \ assertStream.precision( 12 ); \ assertStream << "Expected " << a << ", received " << b << endl; \ assertStream << token; \ moose::__dump__(assertStream.str(), moose::failed); \ throw std::runtime_error( "float equality test failed" ); \ }

memberdef.name: ASSERT_EQ
memberdef.initializer: if( (a) != (b)) { \ assertStream.str(""); \ LOCATION(assertStream); \ assertStream << "Not expected " << a << endl; \ assertStream << token << endl; \ throw std::runtime_error(assertStream.str()); \ }

memberdef.name: ASSERT_FALSE
memberdef.initializer: if( (condition) ) {\ assertStream.str(""); \ assertStream.precision( 9 ); \ assertStream << msg << endl; \ throw std::runtime_error(assertStream.str()); \ }

memberdef.name: ASSERT_NEQ
memberdef.initializer: if( (a) == (b)) { \ assertStream.str(""); \ LOCATION(assertStream); \ assertStream << "Not expected " << a << endl; \ assertStream << token << endl; \ throw std::runtime_error(assertStream.str()); \ }

memberdef.name: ASSERT_TRUE
memberdef.initializer: if( !(condition) ) {\ assertStream.str(""); \ assertStream << msg << endl; \ throw std::runtime_error( assertStream.str() );\ }

memberdef.name: EXPECT_EQ
memberdef.initializer: if( (a) != (b)) { \ assertStream.str(""); \ LOCATION(assertStream) \ assertStream << "Expected " << b << ", received " << a ; \ assertStream << token; \ moose::__dump__(assertStream.str(), moose::failed); \ }

memberdef.name: EXPECT_FALSE
memberdef.initializer: if( (condition) ) {\ assertStream.str(""); \ LOCATION( assertStream ); \ assertStream << msg << endl; \ moose::__dump__(assertStream.str(), moose::failed); \ }

memberdef.name: EXPECT_GT
memberdef.initializer: if( !((a) > (b)) ) { \ assertStream.str(""); \ LOCATION(assertStream); \ assertStream << "Expected greater than " << a << ", received " << b << endl; \ assertStream << token << endl; \ moose::__dump__(assertStream.str(), moose::failed); \ }

memberdef.name: EXPECT_GTE
memberdef.initializer: if( !((a) >= (b)) ) { \ assertStream.str(""); \ LOCATION(assertStream); \ assertStream << "Expected greater than or equal to " << a \ << ", received " << b << endl; \ assertStream << token << endl; \ moose::__dump__(assertStream.str(), moose::failed); \ }

memberdef.name: EXPECT_LT
memberdef.initializer: if( ! ((a) < (b)) ) { \ assertStream.str(""); \ LOCATION(assertStream); \ assertStream << "Expected less than " << a << ", received " << b << endl; \ assertStream << token << endl; \ moose::__dump__(assertStream.str(), moose::failed); \ }

memberdef.name: EXPECT_LTE
memberdef.initializer: if( ! ((a) <= (b)) ) { \ assertStream.str(""); \ LOCATION(assertStream); \ assertStream << "Expected less than or equal to " << a \ << ", received " << b << endl; \ assertStream << token << endl; \ moose::__dump__(assertStream.str(), moose::failed); \ }

memberdef.name: EXPECT_NEQ
memberdef.initializer: if( ! ((a) != (b)) ) { \ assertStream.str(""); \ LOCATION(assertStream); \ assertStream << "Not expected " << a << endl; \ assertStream << token << endl; \ moose::__dump__(assertStream.str(), moose::failed); \ }

memberdef.name: EXPECT_TRUE
memberdef.initializer: if( !(condition) ) {\ assertStream.str(""); \ LOCATION( assertStream ); \ assertStream << msg << endl; \ moose::__dump__(assertStream.str(), moose::failed); \ }

memberdef.name: LOCATION
memberdef.initializer: ss << "In function: " << SIMPLE_CURRENT_FUNCTION; \ ss << " file: " << __FILE__ << ":" << __LINE__ << endl;
